  • Uses of VoronoiCell in geomed.app

    Methods in geomed.app that return types with arguments of type VoronoiCell
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<VoronoiCell>
    MapManager.getVoronoiCells()
    Delegates the generation of Voronoi cells to the dedicated geometry engine.
    Method parameters in geomed.app with type arguments of type VoronoiCell
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    ConsoleRunner.displayVoronoiCells(List<VoronoiCell> cells)
    Displays the calculated Voronoi cells and their sorted vertices in the console.

  • Uses of VoronoiCell in geomed.app.algo

    Methods in geomed.app.algo that return types with arguments of type VoronoiCell
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<VoronoiCell>
    VoronoiEngine.generateVoronoiCells(Set<Hospital> hospitals, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Generates all closed Voronoi cells on the map based on the provided hospitals and Delaunay triangulation.
